emails.subject: Nice Visit with Your Brother
emails.body: Nice Visit with Your Brother Nice to meet your brother. Do you have a map of the 25th? Jim

emails.subject: RE: Nice Visit with Your Brother
emails.body: RE: Nice Visit with Your Brother Yes. I will drop it to you on Monday. MR

emails.subject: RE: Nice Visit with Your Brother
emails.body: RE: Nice Visit with Your Brother To review the congressional map for Texas go to <URL> Click on redistricting service and then click on the map from the October 14th Order. MR To: Robinson, Marchris
